candidate_llm_application: HALCS: corpus-level acidification + LAB-LLM decode-pass + pH-gated pathogen exclusion + iteration to steady state.

results.title: REWIRE (2025/6)
results.judge_justification: Rewrites low-quality docs into useful training data — captures the LAB-decode pass leg.

results.title: Multilingual judge filter (2025/5)
results.judge_justification: Per-doc LLM-judge quality filtering captures the pathogen-exclusion leg.

results.title: Iterative Corpus Self-Distillation (2026/4)
results.judge_justification: Iterative rewrite + per-doc filter at corpus level converging to steady-state quality — captures all three legs of HALCS.

results.title: Quality-Gated Corpus Refinement (2026/2)
results.judge_justification: Quality-gated filter excludes corrupting docs in iterative refinement — captures pathogen-exclusion + iteration legs.
